task_completion.description: Verify the agent successfully logged into Rocket.Chat.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Rocket.Chat workspace interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the workspace invitation creation interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Invite Users' modal or the admin panel section for generating invite links is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the invite link is configured to expire in 7 days and is limited to 50 uses.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the invite creation modal, the 'Expiration' setting is set to 7 days and the 'Max Uses' setting is set to 50.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the correct target channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The '#release-updates' channel is open and active in the main chat window.

task_completion.description: Verify the generated invite link and the exact required text were posted in the channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message is visible in the '#release-updates' chat history containing the text 'Official Beta Program Invite Link' along with a Rocket.Chat invite URL.

task_completion.description: Verify the posted message containing the invite link was pinned.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The message with the invite link displays a 'Pinned' indicator (e.g., a pin icon), or there is a system message indicating the message was pinned, or it appears in the pinned messages sidebar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rocket.Chat web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show interaction with a web browser displaying the Rocket.Chat UI, rather than terminal commands, API scripts, or curl requests.

integrity.description: Verify the posted invite link appears to be genuinely generated by the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The URL in the chat message should look like a valid Rocket.Chat invite link (e.g., containing '/invite/'), not a placeholder or manually typed dummy URL.

integrity.description: Verify the final output is actually in the Rocket.Chat application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The message and pin must be visible within the actual Rocket.Chat chat window, not typed into a text editor, notes app, or terminal.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target channel: #release-updates. Expected message text: 'Official Beta Program Invite Link'. Invite configuration: exactly 7 days expiration and exactly 50 maximum uses.
